message:
fix(node): test correctness and minor refactoring in 6 modules

Test fixes:
- rollback_bundle.rs: Update test expectation from ChecksumMismatch
  to ManifestInvalid — tampering is now caught at manifest integrity
  level before individual checksum comparison
- saga.rs: Rewrite test_saga_audit_log_has_compensated_event to
  properly set up saga state (execute forward step first, then
  compensate) so the audit log correctly reflects the sequence
- root_pointer.rs: Increase timing allowances in concurrency test
  (400ms/500ms waits, 400ms minimum assertion) to reduce flaky
  failures on loaded machines

Minor refactoring:
- eviction_saga.rs: Simplify has_orphan() to return direct boolean
  expression
- impossible_default.rs: Fix indentation
- control_lane_mapping.rs: Reformat long line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
